title: SafeHaven
description: SafeHaven is a customizable home system plugin for Minecraft!
body:
## Developer Note
Hey everyone, Im yeetaaron1 or Aaron. This is my first time publishing a plugin like this. I would love some suggestings and support with this project. I have some great plans for adding support for bedrock players on this plugin. Creating other plugins (*or mods?*) for other programs. And thank you for the people who hit the like on the project and gave me my first download. I really apprecite it! 

## SafeHaven Plugin

**Description:**  
SafeHaven is a customizable home system plugin for Minecraft that allows players to manage their homes easily. With support for multiple storage options (MySQL, Mongodb, SQLite, YAML), SafeHaven enhances the player experience through an intuitive interface and powerful admin tools.

### Features

- **Player Commands:** Task: Finished (Mostly Working)
  - ~~`/sethome [name]`: Set a new home.~~
  - ~~`/home [name]`: Teleport to a home.~~
  - ~~`/homes`: List all homes.~~
  - ~~`/delhome [name]`: Delete a home.~~
- 
- **Admin Commands:** Task: 50/100 (Basic Format)
  - `/safehaven sethome <player> [name]`: Set a home for a player. (Not fully Working)
  - `/safehaven home <player> [name]`: Teleport to a player's home. (Not fully Working)
  - `/safehaven delhome <player> [name]`: Delete a player's home. (Not fully Working)
  - `/safehaven list <player>`: List a player's homes. (Not fully Working)

- **GUI Menus:**
  - **Player GUI**: Manage homes visually. (75/100 Working)
  - **Admin GUI**: View and manage all player homes. (Not fully Working)

- **Configuration System:**
  - ~~Storage options (MySQL, SQLite, YAML, MongoDB).~~
  - ~~Customizable settings in `config.yml` for home limits, messages and language support.~~

### Changelog

**Added:**
- Player and admin commands.
- GUI interfaces for players and admins.
- Support for multiple storage methods.
- Customizable configuration settings.

**Not Yet Implemented:**
- Detailed user documentation.
- Comprehensive beta testing and optimization.
- Ongoing support and updates based on user feedback.
